assets.description: Automated audit of homepage messaging, clarity, trust signals, and conversion elements. Returns specific findings with before/after recommendations. Requires website URL input.
trigger_conditions: Specific homepage issue identified from audit
First touch with cold prospect who has paid/organic traffic
Re-engagement after 90-day hold where homepage has changed
Prospect has asked 'how would you know what to fix?'

progression_rules.after_open_no_reply: Follow up day 3 with LinkedIn referencing the specific finding from the analyser
progression_rules.after_reply: Book 15-min call to walk through specific findings — don't send more content
progression_rules.after_asset_click: Respond within 2 hours with a personalised note on the most critical issue found
progression_rules.after_no_open: Retry on day 5 with subject line variation referencing the issue directly

assets.description: Interactive tool that guides users through creating a tighter, more specific creative brief. Outputs a structured 3-5 field brief that reduces revision cycles.
trigger_conditions: Positive reply received and prospect has agreed to explore
Call booked — send day before as pre-call prep
Warm prospect who mentioned revision cycles or brief quality as a pain point
Agency prospect with high project volume who mentioned process friction

progression_rules.after_use: Follow up with calculator to quantify time saved by better briefs
progression_rules.after_no_use: Retry with a specific use case example matching their industry
progression_rules.after_completion: Move opportunity to 'Proposal' stage and include brief output in conversation
progression_rules.after_call: Reference brief structure discussed on call — don't send again

assets.description: Quantifies business impact of design bottlenecks. Inputs: current production time, number of projects/campaigns, hourly team cost. Outputs: annual cost of inefficiency, potential revenue unlock.
trigger_conditions: Revenue or cost angle explicitly acknowledged by prospect
Agency prospect asking about margin improvement or overhead reduction
Marketing manager who mentioned campaign production time or budget constraints
Founder who asked 'what's the ROI?' or mentioned burn rate concerns
Second or third touch with warm prospect who engaged with analyser

progression_rules.after_use: Book call to discuss the calculation results — frame as 'worth exploring the gap'
progression_rules.after_no_use: Follow up on day 3 with a pre-filled example calculation for their industry
progression_rules.after_call: Include the calculation summary in the proposal or follow-up email
progression_rules.if_financial_objection: Reference the calculator results directly in objection reframe

assets.description: 6-point homepage conversion checklist covering hero clarity, CTA strength, trust signal placement, above-fold structure, mobile readability, and decision path length. Lightweight and fast to use.
trigger_conditions: Touch 3 with cold prospect who hasn't replied — lighter than analyser
Prospect who opened email but didn't reply — re-engage with tangible asset
Founder or marketing manager who mentioned they 'already have a site' — frame as self-audit tool
First touch where multiple small issues detected (not one dominant issue)

progression_rules.after_open_no_reply: Follow up on day 3 referencing the specific checklist section most relevant to their issue
progression_rules.after_reply: Escalate to analyser for a full automated audit — position as 'deeper version'
progression_rules.after_click: Respond with a pre-filled analyser result that shows how they score on the checklist items
progression_rules.after_no_engage: Move to calculator angle on next touch — checklist didn't land, try financial framing

assets.description: Client result presented as a before/after benchmark. Format: problem identified, changes made, measurable result achieved. Specific to industry or ICP type for maximum relevance.
trigger_conditions: Trust or credibility objection raised explicitly
Prospect asks 'have you done this before for someone like us?'
Warm prospect in active evaluation comparing multiple vendors
Agency prospect asking for proof of client outcome (not just service description)
Post-call follow-up to reinforce the specific result discussed

progression_rules.after_share: Follow up on day 2 asking which part of the result was most relevant to their situation
progression_rules.after_call: Reference the specific case study result in the proposal — match client profile to prospect profile
progression_rules.after_objection: Match the case study to the specific objection type — send a different case study for each objection
progression_rules.after_no_response: Follow up with a shorter one-line result summary rather than full case study

assets.description: Snapshot of Design Bees' operational methodology. Example sections: '5-Step Brief Structure for Faster Approvals' or 'How We Reduce Revision Cycles.' 2-3 pages, actionable, not salesy.
trigger_conditions: Agency or marketing manager who asked about Design Bees' methodology or process
Post-call follow-up where process or system was the main discussion topic
Prospect who mentioned they've had poor experiences with vague design process in the past
Warm prospect in evaluation asking 'how do you actually work?'

progression_rules.after_share: Follow up asking if the methodology aligns with how their team works — open a process conversation
progression_rules.after_interest: Book a call to walk through the methodology in detail — position as a 'process audit'
progression_rules.after_no_response: Move to calculator on next touch — if methodology didn't land, switch to financial framing
progression_rules.after_call: Send playbook as post-call follow-up to reinforce what was discussed

recommendation_engine.logic: Match by icp_fit AND issue_fit first. Filter by funnel_stage_best to ensure readiness. Exclude already-used assets to maintain novelty. Prioritize assets with highest conversion rate for this segment. Break ties by engagement level (cold → checklist, warm → calculator).

override_rules.if_multiple_issues_detected: Use analyser first to holistically identify all issues
override_rules.if_strong_financial_focus: Prioritize calculator regardless of funnel stage
override_rules.if_process_focus: Prioritize brief_builder if founder or marketing manager
override_rules.if_credibility_question: Prioritize case_study that matches prospect profile
override_rules.if_objection_handling: Use asset that directly addresses objection type (ROI objection → calculator, proof objection → case_study)

founder.rationale: Founders are time-constrained and skeptical of tools. Start lightweight (checklist), use analyser as proof of problems, calculator for impact, case study for validation.

marketing_manager.rationale: Marketing managers want proof of problems and financial impact. Analyser shows specific issues, calculator shows revenue impact, brief_builder shows process improvement, case study shows peer validation.

agency.rationale: Agencies care about margin and efficiency first. Calculator shows revenue opportunity, brief_builder shows process improvement, playbook shows methodology, case study shows results for clients.
